Public types and operations for DimSlash interaction applications.

The API has three ownership layers. DiscordApp is an immutable route definition; AppBinding owns mutable gateway/runtime state; specialized contexts own the response capability for a single request. Discord and Dimscord objects do not escape into handlers: identifiers, resolved entities, messages, embeds, components, and interaction snapshots are DimSlash-owned.

Response operations enforce ResponseState. Immediate response operations require Pending; defer transitions permit editOriginal; follow-ups and webhook edits require an acknowledged interaction. OutcomeUnknown is a terminal safety state used when delivery cannot be proven either accepted or rejected.

Route factories declare persistent commands and custom-ID routes. Checks run before binding-owned cooldowns. Collector operations are short-lived and take precedence over persistent component/modal routes. Binding shutdown first quiesces new work, wakes collectors, and then drains active handlers.

Most users should import the top-level dimslash module, which also re-exports async dispatch, JSON, and option helpers used in handler declarations.

Types

ActivityInstance = object
Activity instance returned by a launch callback. 
AllowedMentions = object
  parseEveryone*: bool       ## Allow `@everyone` and `@here` parsing.
  parseUsers*: bool          ## Parse all user mentions in message content.
  parseRoles*: bool          ## Parse all role mentions in message content.
  repliedUser*: bool         ## Mention the author of a replied-to message.
  users*: seq[UserId]        ## Explicit user IDs allowed to receive a mention.
  roles*: seq[RoleId]        ## Explicit role IDs allowed to receive a mention.
Controls which mention syntax Discord expands. The default value suppresses every automatic mention and is therefore safe for user text. 
AppBinding = ref object
Runtime attachment of one DiscordApp to one transport. It owns gateway lifecycle, command-sync cache, cooldown buckets, collectors, and active-request draining. Create it with bindGateway. 
ApplicationId = distinct string
Discord snowflake identifying an application. 
Attachment = object
Existing Discord attachment supplied to a command. 
AttachmentId = distinct string
Discord snowflake identifying an attachment. 
AutocompleteContext = ref object of InteractionContext
Context for one focused slash-option autocomplete request. It can only be acknowledged with complete. 
Button = object
  label*: string             ## Visible button label.
  style*: ButtonStyle        ## Button appearance and interaction behavior.
  customId*: Option[string]  ## Developer ID emitted by non-link buttons.
  url*: Option[string]       ## Destination used only by `Link` buttons.
  disabled*: bool            ## Whether Discord renders the button as unavailable.
Interactive or link button used in classic and V2 layouts. Prefer button or linkButton; they enforce the mutually exclusive custom-ID and URL forms. 
ButtonStyle = enum
  Primary = 1,              ## Blurple action button with a custom ID.
  Secondary = 2,            ## Neutral grey action button with a custom ID.
  Success = 3,              ## Green action button with a custom ID.
  Danger = 4,               ## Red destructive-action button with a custom ID.
  Link = 5                   ## URL button that does not create an interaction.
Visual and behavioral Discord button style. 
ChannelId = distinct string
Discord snowflake identifying a channel. 
ChannelKind = enum
  GuildText = 0,            ## Guild text channel.
  DirectMessage = 1,        ## One-to-one direct message.
  GuildVoice = 2,           ## Guild voice channel.
  GroupDirectMessage = 3,   ## Group direct message.
  GuildCategory = 4,        ## Guild category.
  GuildAnnouncement = 5,    ## Guild announcement channel.
  AnnouncementThread = 10,  ## Thread in an announcement channel.
  PublicThread = 11,        ## Public guild thread.
  PrivateThread = 12,       ## Private guild thread.
  GuildStageVoice = 13,     ## Guild stage channel.
  GuildDirectory = 14,      ## Guild directory channel.
  GuildForum = 15,          ## Guild forum channel.
  GuildMedia = 16            ## Guild media channel.
Discord channel type used by channel option constraints. 
CheckDecision = object
  case kind*: CheckDecisionKind ## Selects the decision payload.
  of CheckPassed:
    nil
  of CheckRejected:
    rejectionMessage*: string ## Safe user-facing explanation.
Explicit allow-or-deny result from a route check. 
CheckDecisionKind = enum
  CheckPassed,              ## Continue to later checks, cooldown, and handler dispatch.
  CheckRejected              ## Stop dispatch and reject with a safe message.
Result of a route precondition. 
Choice = object
  name*: string              ## Human-readable choice label.
  value*: JsonNode           ## Scalar value returned to the command handler.
Named string, integer, or number autocomplete/command choice. 
ClassicActionRow = object
  components*: seq[ClassicComponent] ## Up to five buttons or exactly one select.
Top-level classic component row. 
ClassicComponent = object
  case kind*: ClassicComponentKind ## Selects the active child.
  of ClassicButton:
    button*: Button          ## Button child.
  of ClassicSelect:
    selectMenu*: SelectMenu  ## Select-menu child.
Variant for one classic action-row child. 
ClassicComponentKind = enum
  ClassicButton,            ## A button component.
  ClassicSelect              ## A select menu component.
Component stored in a classic action row. 
ClassicMessage = object
  content*: Option[string]   ## Optional message text.
  embeds*: seq[Embed]        ## Ordered embeds; Discord currently accepts at most ten.
  rows*: seq[ClassicActionRow] ## Top-level classic action rows.
  allowedMentions*: AllowedMentions ## Mention expansion policy.
  files*: seq[UploadedFile]  ## New multipart attachments.
  ephemeral*: bool           ## Make an initial response or follow-up visible only to its invoker.
  tts*: bool                 ## Request text-to-speech delivery where Discord supports it.
Traditional Discord message response payload. Construct it with classicMessage, then add embeds, rows, mentions, or files as needed. 
CommandOption = object
  name*: string              ## Discord option name.
  description*: string       ## User-facing option description.
  kind*: OptionKind          ## Wire type and handler decoding rule.
  required*: bool            ## Whether omission is rejected before handler execution.
  minValue*: Option[float]   ## Optional numeric lower bound.
  maxValue*: Option[float]   ## Optional numeric upper bound.
  minLength*: Option[int]    ## Optional string-length lower bound.
  maxLength*: Option[int]    ## Optional string-length upper bound.
  autocomplete*: bool        ## Whether a focused request uses an autocomplete route.
  choices*: seq[Choice]      ## Static choices; mutually exclusive with autocomplete.
  channelKinds*: seq[ChannelKind] ## Allowed channel types for channel options.
  nameLocalizations*: Table[string, string] ## Locale-to-name translations.
  descriptionLocalizations*: Table[string, string] ## Locale-to-description translations.
Derived or explicitly supplied slash-option schema. Typed route macros construct this from handler parameters and their DimSlash pragmas. 
CommandScope = object
  case kind*: CommandScopeKind ## Selects global or guild registration.
  of GlobalCommands:
    nil
  of GuildCommands:
    guildId*: GuildId        ## Guild receiving the overwrite.
Explicit command scope managed by an AppBinding. Every listed scope is authoritatively bulk-overwritten; unlisted scopes are never touched. 
CommandScopeKind = enum
  GlobalCommands,           ## Global commands available according to command contexts.
  GuildCommands              ## Commands registered to one guild for immediate availability.
Discord application-command overwrite scope. 
ComponentCheck = proc (ctx: ComponentContext): Future[CheckDecision]
Async precondition for one button or select route. 
ComponentContext = ref object of InteractionContext
Context for a button or select submission. Captures come from the matched custom-ID pattern; resolved selections remain in Discord submission order. 
ComponentInteractionKind = enum
  ButtonInteraction,        ## Button presses.
  SelectInteraction          ## String or entity select submissions.
Component family accepted by a collector. 
CooldownRule = object
  durationMs*: int64         ## Cooldown length in milliseconds; must be positive.
  scope*: CooldownScope      ## Principal used to build the bucket key.
Positive monotonic cooldown duration and partition. 
CooldownScope = enum
  GlobalCooldown,           ## Every invocation shares the same bucket.
  UserCooldown,             ## Each invoking user has an independent bucket.
  GuildCooldown              ## Each guild has an independent bucket; DMs are rejected.
Principal sharing one route cooldown bucket. 
DimSlashError = object of CatchableError
Base class for recoverable DimSlash failures. 
DiscordApp = object
Immutable route definition reusable across bindings. It contains no token, gateway connection, cooldown bucket, waiter, or request-scoped response state. 
Embed = object
  title*: Option[string]     ## Optional title text.
  description*: Option[string] ## Optional markdown body.
  url*: Option[string]       ## Optional link associated with the title.
  timestamp*: Option[string] ## Optional ISO-8601 timestamp.
  color*: Option[int]        ## Optional RGB color in `0x000000..0xFFFFFF`.
  footer*: Option[EmbedFooter] ## Optional footer.
  image*: Option[EmbedMedia] ## Optional large image.
  thumbnail*: Option[EmbedMedia] ## Optional thumbnail image.
  author*: Option[EmbedAuthor] ## Optional author header.
  fields*: seq[EmbedField]   ## Ordered embed fields.
Classic Discord embed payload owned by DimSlash. Discord length and aggregate limits still apply when sent. 
EmbedAuthor = object
  name*: string              ## Visible author text.
  url*: Option[string]       ## Optional link opened from the author name.
  iconUrl*: Option[string]   ## Optional icon shown beside the author.
Author header displayed at the top of an embed. 
EmbedField = object
  name*: string              ## Field heading.
  value*: string             ## Field body; Discord markdown is supported.
  inline*: bool              ## Whether Discord may lay this field beside another.
One named value in an embed field grid. 
EmbedFooter = object
  text*: string              ## Visible footer text.
  iconUrl*: Option[string]   ## Optional icon shown beside the footer.
Footer displayed below an embed. 
EmbedMedia = object
  url*: string               ## HTTPS, attachment, or Discord-supported media URL.
URL-backed image used by an embed. 
ErrorAction = object
  case kind*: ErrorActionKind ## Selects the recovery behavior.
  of RespondEphemeral:
    message*: string         ## Safe message shown to the invoking user.
  else:
    nil
State-aware recovery action for a caught handler error. 
ErrorActionKind = enum
  Reraise,                  ## Propagate the caught error after policy evaluation.
  Ignore,                   ## Suppress the error without producing another response.
  RespondEphemeral,         ## Send a safe invoker-only message if state permits.
  CompleteAutocomplete       ## Return an empty autocomplete result if still pending.
Explicit result returned by an ErrorHandler. 
ErrorHandler = proc (ctx: InteractionContext; error: ref CatchableError): Future[
    ErrorAction]
Async application error policy. DimSlash catches only CatchableError; Defect values bypass this hook. 
GatewayIntent = enum
  Guilds = 0,               ## Guild create/update/delete and channel events.
  GuildMembers,             ## Guild member events; privileged.
  GuildModeration,          ## Ban and moderation events.
  GuildEmojisAndStickers,   ## Emoji and sticker events.
  GuildIntegrations,        ## Integration events.
  GuildWebhooks,            ## Webhook update events.
  GuildInvites,             ## Invite events.
  GuildVoiceStates,         ## Voice-state events.
  GuildPresences,           ## Presence events; privileged.
  GuildMessages,            ## Guild message events.
  GuildMessageReactions,    ## Reactions on guild messages.
  GuildMessageTyping,       ## Typing indicators in guild channels.
  DirectMessages,           ## Direct-message events.
  DirectMessageReactions,   ## Reactions on direct messages.
  DirectMessageTyping,      ## Typing indicators in direct messages.
  MessageContent,           ## Message content fields; privileged.
  GuildScheduledEvents = 16, ## Scheduled-event updates.
  AutoModerationConfiguration = 20, ## AutoMod rule updates.
  AutoModerationExecution,  ## AutoMod action executions.
  GuildMessagePolls = 24,   ## Poll votes on guild messages.
  DirectMessagePolls         ## Poll votes on direct messages.
Gateway event subscription requested by bindGateway. Privileged intents must also be enabled in the Discord developer portal. 
GuildId = distinct string
Discord snowflake identifying a guild. 
IntegrationKind = enum
  GuildInstall = 0,         ## Application installed to a guild.
  UserInstall = 1            ## Application installed to a user account.
Installation owner allowed to invoke a command. 
Interaction = object
Immutable DimSlash-owned interaction snapshot. Accessors return owned values or copies; raw exposes a copy of the complete gateway payload for fields not modeled by DimSlash. 
InteractionContext = ref object of RootObj
Request-scoped response capability shared by specialized contexts. It owns the response state machine for exactly one interaction and must not be retained as application-global mutable state. 
InteractionContextKind = enum
  GuildContext = 0,         ## A guild channel.
  BotDirectMessageContext = 1, ## Direct message with the installed bot.
  PrivateChannelContext = 2  ## Private channel for a user-installed app.
Surface where an application command is usable. 
InteractionId = distinct string
Discord snowflake identifying one interaction. 
InteractionKind = enum
  SlashCommand,             ## Chat-input application command.
  UserCommand,              ## User context-menu command.
  MessageCommand,           ## Message context-menu command.
  Autocomplete,             ## Focused slash-option autocomplete request.
  MessageComponent,         ## Button or select-menu submission.
  ModalSubmit                ## Submitted modal form.
High-level Discord interaction category. 
InvalidInteractionError = object of DimSlashError
Raised when a Discord interaction payload is missing required data or contains an unsupported wire value. 
InvalidResponseStateError = object of DimSlashError
Raised when a response operation is illegal in the current state. 
MediaItem = object
  url*: string               ## HTTPS or `attachment://filename` media URL.
  description*: Option[string] ## Optional media description or alt text.
  spoiler*: bool             ## Whether Discord hides the media behind a spoiler.
Media reference used by V2 galleries and accessories. 
Member = object
Guild membership data resolved for an interaction. The contained User is always present; nickname and permissions depend on the Discord payload. 
Mentionable = object
  case kind*: MentionableKind ## Selects the active variant.
  of MentionableUser:
    mentionedUser*: User     ## Resolved user for `MentionableUser`.
  of MentionableRole:
    mentionedRole*: Role     ## Resolved role for `MentionableRole`.
A resolved user-or-role command value. 
MentionableKind = enum
  MentionableUser,          ## A user was selected or resolved.
  MentionableRole            ## A role was selected or resolved.
Concrete entity stored in a Mentionable value. 
Message = object
DimSlash-owned message result or interaction snapshot. Only fields guaranteed useful to interaction handlers are retained; use Interaction.raw for unsupported data. 
MessageBody = object
  case kind*: MessageBodyKind ## Selects the active representation.
  of ClassicBody:
    classic*: ClassicMessage ## Classic message payload.
  of ComponentsV2Body:
    v2*: V2Message           ## Components V2 payload.
Explicit classic-or-V2 response/edit payload. 
MessageBodyKind = enum
  ClassicBody,              ## Content, embeds, and classic action rows.
  ComponentsV2Body           ## Components V2 layout with the V2 message flag.
Wire representation carried by MessageBody. 
MessageCommandCheck = proc (ctx: MessageCommandContext): Future[CheckDecision]
Async precondition for one message context-menu command. 
MessageCommandContext = ref object of InteractionContext
Context for a message context-menu command with its resolved target. 
MessageId = distinct string
Discord snowflake identifying a message. 
MissingInitialResponseError = object of DimSlashError
Raised after a handler returns without acknowledging its interaction. 
Modal = object
  customId*: string          ## Developer ID used for modal route matching.
  title*: string             ## Dialog title displayed by Discord.
  inputs*: seq[ModalInput]   ## Ordered Label-wrapped inputs.
Modal response containing one or more text inputs. 
ModalCheck = proc (ctx: ModalContext): Future[CheckDecision]
Async precondition for one modal route. 
ModalContext = ref object of InteractionContext
Context for a submitted modal with decoded fields and optional source. 
ModalInput = object
  customId*: string          ## Developer ID used as the typed handler parameter name.
  label*: string             ## Visible Label heading.
  description*: Option[string] ## Optional Label description below the heading.
  style*: TextInputStyle     ## Single-line or paragraph presentation.
  required*: bool            ## Whether Discord requires a non-empty submission.
  minLength*: Option[int]    ## Optional minimum input length.
  maxLength*: Option[int]    ## Optional maximum input length.
  value*: Option[string]     ## Optional pre-filled value.
  placeholder*: Option[string] ## Optional hint shown for an empty input.
Text input wrapped in Discord's current Label component. Prefer textInput, which validates ID and length constraints before response authority is consumed. 
ModalSource = object
Capabilities inherited from the interaction opening a modal. Component-origin submissions may include the source message and may use update or deferUpdate. 
ModalSourceKind = enum
  CommandModalSource,       ## Opened from an application command.
  ComponentModalSource       ## Opened from a message component interaction.
Interaction class that originally opened a modal. 
OptionKind = enum
  StringOption = 3,         ## UTF-8 string value.
  IntegerOption = 4,        ## Integer value within Discord's safe range.
  BooleanOption = 5,        ## Boolean value.
  UserOption = 6,           ## Resolved `User` or guild `Member`.
  ChannelOption = 7,        ## Resolved `ResolvedChannel`.
  RoleOption = 8,           ## Resolved `Role`.
  MentionableOption = 9,    ## Resolved `Mentionable` user or role.
  NumberOption = 10,        ## Floating-point number.
  AttachmentOption = 11      ## Resolved existing `Attachment`.
Discord slash-command option wire type. 
Permissions = distinct uint64
Discord permission bits without a Dimscord dependency. 
ResolvedChannel = object
Minimal Discord channel resolved by an interaction. The name is absent when Discord omits it. 
ResponseOutcomeUnknownError = object of DimSlashError
Raised after transport failure leaves initial-response delivery unknown. Further mutations are refused because retrying could acknowledge twice. 
ResponseRejectedError = object of CatchableError
Raised when Discord definitively rejects an initial response. The controller returns to Pending, so the error policy may choose a different legal initial response. 
ResponseState = enum
  Pending,                  ## No initial response has been attempted.
  DeferredReply,            ## A deferred message acknowledgement was accepted.
  DeferredUpdate,           ## A deferred source-message update was accepted.
  Responded,                ## An immediate initial response was accepted.
  OutcomeUnknown             ## Transport failure made acknowledgement delivery ambiguous.
Authoritative initial-response state for one context. 
Role = object
Minimal Discord role resolved from command or select data. 
RoleId = distinct string
Discord snowflake identifying a role. 
RouteDefinitionError = object of DimSlashError
Raised while constructing an invalid or conflicting route table. 
RouteFactory = proc (routes: var Routes)
Closure that declares every persistent route and policy. newDiscordApp evaluates it exactly once. 
Routes = object
Mutable route builder passed only to a RouteFactory. After newDiscordApp returns, its frozen table is owned by the app and no longer exposed for mutation. 
SectionAccessory = object
  case kind*: SectionAccessoryKind ## Selects the active accessory.
  of AccessoryButton:
    accessoryButton*: Button ## Button accessory.
  of AccessoryThumbnail:
    thumbnail*: MediaItem    ## Thumbnail accessory.
Button-or-thumbnail variant for a V2 section. 
SectionAccessoryKind = enum
  AccessoryButton,          ## Interactive or link button.
  AccessoryThumbnail         ## Non-interactive thumbnail media.
Accessory displayed beside a V2 section. 
SelectMenu = object
  kind*: SelectMenuKind      ## Selected entity family.
  customId*: string          ## Developer ID used for dispatch and captures.
  placeholder*: Option[string] ## Text shown while no value is selected.
  minValues*: int            ## Minimum submitted selections.
  maxValues*: int            ## Maximum submitted selections.
  disabled*: bool            ## Whether Discord renders the menu as unavailable.
  options*: seq[SelectOption] ## Options used only by `StringSelect`.
  channelKinds*: seq[ChannelKind] ## Allowed kinds used only by `ChannelSelect`.
Select component submitted as one component interaction. Prefer the typed select builders so Discord's cardinality and option constraints are validated. 
SelectMenuKind = enum
  StringSelect = 3,         ## Selects caller-defined string options.
  UserSelect = 5,           ## Selects guild users.
  RoleSelect = 6,           ## Selects guild roles.
  MentionableSelect = 7,    ## Selects users or roles.
  ChannelSelect = 8          ## Selects channels, optionally constrained by kind.
Entity family selected by a Discord select menu. 
SelectOption = object
  label*: string             ## Visible option label.
  value*: string             ## Opaque value returned in `ComponentContext.values`.
  description*: Option[string] ## Optional secondary text.
  default*: bool             ## Whether the option starts selected.
One option in a string select menu. 
SlashCheck = proc (ctx: SlashCommandContext): Future[CheckDecision]
Async precondition for one slash-command path. 
SlashCommandContext = ref object of InteractionContext
Context for a typed slash-command or subcommand handler. 
SyncResult = object
  scope*: CommandScope       ## Scope that Discord accepted.
  commandCount*: int         ## Number of local commands written to that scope.
Result summary for one completed scope overwrite. 
TextInputStyle = enum
  ShortText = 1,            ## Single-line input.
  ParagraphText = 2          ## Multi-line paragraph input.
Discord presentation style for a modal text input. 
UploadedFile = object
  filename*: string          ## Plain basename used for the Discord attachment.
  content*: string           ## Raw file bytes; the string need not be UTF-8.
  description*: Option[string] ## Optional attachment description or alt text.
In-memory file attached through multipart upload. 
User = object
Minimal DimSlash-owned Discord user snapshot. 
UserCommandCheck = proc (ctx: UserCommandContext): Future[CheckDecision]
Async precondition for one user context-menu command. 
UserCommandContext = ref object of InteractionContext
Context for a user context-menu command with its resolved target. 
UserId = distinct string
Discord snowflake identifying a user. 
UserRejectionError = object of CatchableError
A deliberate user-facing rejection handled by the default error policy. Construct it with userRejection so the safe message survives async traceback decoration. 
V2Component = ref object
  case kind*: V2ComponentKind ## Selects the active node payload.
  of TextDisplay:
    text*: string            ## Markdown displayed by a text node.
  of V2ActionRow:
    interactiveComponents*: seq[ClassicComponent] ## Interactive row children.
  of Section:
    sectionTexts*: seq[string] ## One to three ordered markdown blocks.
    sectionAccessory*: SectionAccessory ## Accessory beside the section text.
  of MediaGallery:
    mediaItems*: seq[MediaItem] ## Ordered gallery media.
  of FileDisplay:
    fileItem*: MediaItem     ## Uploaded file reference.
  of Separator:
    divider*: bool           ## Whether a visible divider is rendered.
    spacing*: range[1 .. 2]  ## Discord spacing size: 1 small, 2 large.
  of Container:
    containerComponents*: seq[V2Component] ## Nested V2 children.
    accentColor*: Option[int] ## Optional RGB accent in `0x000000..0xFFFFFF`.
    containerSpoiler*: bool  ## Whether the entire container is hidden as a spoiler.
One validated Components V2 layout node. Nodes are references so containers can be built recursively; constructors reject cycles and illegal nesting before serialization. 
V2ComponentKind = enum
  TextDisplay,              ## Markdown text block.
  V2ActionRow,              ## Row containing buttons or one select menu.
  Section,                  ## One to three text blocks with a button or thumbnail accessory.
  MediaGallery,             ## Gallery of one or more media items.
  FileDisplay,              ## Display for an uploaded `attachment://` file.
  Separator,                ## Optional divider and vertical spacing.
  Container                  ## Nested visual group with optional accent and spoiler state.
Layout node available in Components V2 messages. 
V2Message = object
  components*: seq[V2Component] ## Top-level V2 layout nodes.
  allowedMentions*: AllowedMentions ## Mention expansion policy for text nodes.
  files*: seq[UploadedFile]  ## Files referenced by file or media nodes.
  ephemeral*: bool           ## Make an initial response or follow-up invoker-only.
Message whose content is entirely Components V2. Discord does not allow converting an existing V2 original response back to classic content or embeds.

Procs

proc `$`(value: ApplicationId | InteractionId | MessageId | UserId | GuildId |
    ChannelId |
    RoleId |
    AttachmentId): string
Returns the original Discord snowflake text without numeric conversion. 
proc `==`(left, right: ApplicationId): bool {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Compares application snowflakes by their wire text. 
proc `==`(left, right: AttachmentId): bool {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Compares attachment snowflakes by their wire text. 
proc `==`(left, right: ChannelId): bool {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Compares channel snowflakes by their wire text. 
proc `==`(left, right: GuildId): bool {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [],
                                        forbids: [].}
Compares guild snowflakes by their wire text. 
proc `==`(left, right: InteractionId): bool {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Compares interaction snowflakes by their wire text. 
proc `==`(left, right: MessageId): bool {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Compares message snowflakes by their wire text. 
proc `==`(left, right: RoleId): bool {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compares role snowflakes by their wire text. 
proc `==`(left, right: UserId): bool {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compares user snowflakes by their wire text. 
proc actionRow(buttons: varargs[Button]): ClassicActionRow {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a classic row containing 1..5 buttons. Raises ValueError outside that range. 
proc actionRow(menu: SelectMenu): ClassicActionRow {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Wraps one select menu as the sole child of a classic action row. 
proc add(value: var Embed; field: sink EmbedField) {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Appends field to an embed, consuming the field value. Raises ValueError once Discord's 25-field limit is reached. 
proc allow(): CheckDecision {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a passing route-check decision. 
proc applicationId(value: Interaction): ApplicationId {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the application that owns the interaction. 
proc appPermissions(ctx: InteractionContext): Permissions {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the application's effective permissions in the invoking channel. 
proc appPermissions(value: Interaction): Permissions {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the application's effective permissions in the invoking channel. 
proc author(value: Message): Option[User] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the message author when Discord included it. 
proc autocomplete(routes: var Routes; commandPath, optionName: string;
                  handler: AutocompleteHandler) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Attaches an autocomplete handler to an existing scalar slash option. commandPath uses slash-separated root/subcommand segments. Autocomplete is valid only for string, integer, and number options without fixed choices; violations raise RouteDefinitionError. 
proc bindGateway(app: DiscordApp; token: string;
                 managedScopes = @[globalScope()];
                 gatewayIntents: set[GatewayIntent] = {Guilds};
                 messageContentIntent = false; autoReconnect = true): AppBinding {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a gateway runtime without starting its session. Runtime configuration is supplied directly so the route-only DiscordApp remains reusable. managedScopes are the only command scopes later overwritten by syncCommands; duplicates raise ValueError. Privileged gateway intents must be enabled in Discord's developer portal. The token is retained by Dimscord's client and is never stored in DiscordApp. 
proc button(label, customId: string; style = Primary; disabled = false): Button {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates an interactive non-link button. Labels must contain 1..80 characters, custom IDs 1..100, and style cannot be Link; violations raise ValueError. 
proc button(routes: var Routes; pattern: string; handler: ComponentHandler) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Registers a persistent button route for a custom-ID pattern. Patterns support {name} string and {name:int} integer captures. Duplicate patterns or malformed captures raise RouteDefinitionError. 
proc buttonAccessory(button: Button): SectionAccessory {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Wraps a valid interactive or link button as a section accessory. Raises ValueError if the raw Button has neither custom ID nor URL. 
proc capture(ctx: ComponentContext | ModalContext; name: string): string
Returns a named string or integer capture from the matched custom-ID route. Raises InvalidInteractionError when the route declared no such capture. 
proc captureInt(ctx: ComponentContext | ModalContext; name: string): int
Parses a named custom-ID capture as an integer. Missing or non-integer values raise InvalidInteractionError. 
proc channelId(ctx: InteractionContext): Option[ChannelId] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the invoking channel ID when Discord supplied it. 
proc channelId(value: Interaction): Option[ChannelId] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the invoking channel when Discord supplied one. 
proc channelSelect(customId: string; channelKinds: set[ChannelKind] = {};
                   placeholder = ""; minValues = 1; maxValues = 1;
                   disabled = false): SelectMenu {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a channel select optionally restricted to channelKinds. An empty set lets Discord offer every channel kind available to the user. 
proc checkButton(routes: var Routes; pattern: string; check: ComponentCheck) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Appends an async precondition to an existing button pattern. 
proc checkCooldown(ctx: InteractionContext; key: string; rule: CooldownRule) {....raises: [
    DimSlashError, ValueError, Exception, UserRejectionError, KeyError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Atomically checks and consumes one binding-owned cooldown bucket. key identifies the operation while rule.scope partitions it globally, by user, or by guild. A live bucket or unavailable principal raises a safe UserRejectionError. Empty keys, non-positive durations, and unbound contexts raise programming/configuration errors. 
proc checkMessageCommand(routes: var Routes; name: string;
                         check: MessageCommandCheck) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Appends an async precondition to an existing message command. A nil check or unknown command raises RouteDefinitionError. 
proc checkModal(routes: var Routes; pattern: string; check: ModalCheck) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Appends an async precondition to an existing modal pattern. A nil check or unknown pattern raises RouteDefinitionError. 
proc checkSelect(routes: var Routes; pattern: string; check: ComponentCheck) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Appends an async precondition to an existing select pattern. 
proc checkSlash(routes: var Routes; path: string; check: SlashCheck) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Appends an async precondition to an existing slash path. Checks run in registration order before cooldown acquisition; a rejection stops dispatch without consuming the route's cooldown. 
proc checkUserCommand(routes: var Routes; name: string; check: UserCommandCheck) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Appends an async precondition to an existing user command. A nil check or unknown command raises RouteDefinitionError. 
proc choice(name, value: string): Choice {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a string-valued slash or autocomplete choice. 
proc choice(name: string; value: float): Choice {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Creates a number-valued slash or autocomplete choice. 
proc choice(name: string; value: int): Choice {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Creates an integer-valued slash or autocomplete choice. 
proc classicMessage(content = ""; ephemeral = false): ClassicMessage {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a classic message response with optional content. Mention parsing initially follows Discord's normal behavior; assign noMentions() when incorporating untrusted text. 
proc commandName(ctx: SlashCommandContext): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the top-level slash-command name. 
proc commandPath(ctx: SlashCommandContext): seq[string] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns a copy of the matched subcommand path, excluding the root name. 
proc commands(app: DiscordApp): JsonNode {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Builds a fresh authoritative Discord application-command array. Slash paths are grouped into subcommand structures; metadata and context commands are included. Mutating the returned JSON cannot change app. Conflicting group descriptions raise RouteDefinitionError. 
proc complete(ctx: AutocompleteContext; choices: openArray[Choice]): Future[void] {....raises: [
    ValueError, Exception, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
    InvalidResponseStateError, ResponseRejectedError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Completes an autocomplete interaction with at most 25 choices. Choice names must contain 1..100 characters. Validation failures raise ValueError without consuming the pending response. 
proc componentsV2(components: seq[V2Component]; ephemeral = false): V2Message {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Validates and creates a Components V2 message. Raises ValueError for nil nodes, cycles, duplicate custom IDs, illegal nesting, invalid child counts, or more than 40 total components. 
proc configureMessageCommand(routes: var Routes; name: string;
                             defaultMemberPermissions = none(uint64);
                             nsfw = false;
                             contexts = none(set[InteractionContextKind]);
                             integrations = none(set[IntegrationKind]);
                             nameLocalizations = Table[string, string]()) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Applies permissions, NSFW, surface, install, and name-localization metadata to an existing message context-menu command. 
proc configureSlash(routes: var Routes; name: string;
                    defaultMemberPermissions = none(uint64); nsfw = false;
                    contexts = none(set[InteractionContextKind]);
                    integrations = none(set[IntegrationKind]);
                    nameLocalizations = Table[string, string]();
                    descriptionLocalizations = Table[string, string]()) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Applies Discord command metadata to every path under slash root name. none leaves Discord's default permissions, contexts, or integrations; localization tables are copied into the sync payload. Unknown roots raise RouteDefinitionError. 
proc configureUserCommand(routes: var Routes; name: string;
                          defaultMemberPermissions = none(uint64); nsfw = false;
                          contexts = none(set[InteractionContextKind]);
                          integrations = none(set[IntegrationKind]);
                          nameLocalizations = Table[string, string]()) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Applies permissions, NSFW, surface, install, and name-localization metadata to an existing user context-menu command. 
proc confirm(ctx: InteractionContext; prompt: string; yesLabel = "Yes";
             noLabel = "No"; timeoutMs = 60000; ephemeral = true): Future[bool] {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ValueError,
                                ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
                                InvalidResponseStateError,
                                ResponseRejectedError, KeyError,
                                RouteDefinitionError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Runs a two-button confirmation flow scoped to this interaction and user. It responds, edits a defer, or follows up according to current state, then disables both buttons. Returns true only for the affirmative press; timeout and shutdown return false. Transport and response-state errors propagate. 
proc container(components: openArray[V2Component]; accentColor = none(int);
               spoiler = false): V2Component {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Creates a non-empty V2 container with optional RGB accent and spoiler. Nested containers and complete tree constraints are checked by componentsV2; invalid emptiness or color raises ValueError immediately. 
proc containsAll(value, required: Permissions): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Reports whether every bit in required is present in value. 
proc content(value: Message): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the message content present in the response or interaction payload. 
proc cooldownButton(routes: var Routes; pattern: string; rule: CooldownRule) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Assigns or replaces a cooldown for an existing button pattern. Captured values do not create distinct route identities; the registered pattern and selected cooldown scope determine the bucket. 
proc cooldownMessageCommand(routes: var Routes; name: string; rule: CooldownRule) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Assigns or replaces a binding-local cooldown for a message command. 
proc cooldownModal(routes: var Routes; pattern: string; rule: CooldownRule) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Assigns or replaces a cooldown for an existing modal pattern. 
proc cooldownRule(durationMs: int64; scope = UserCooldown): CooldownRule {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a validated binding-owned monotonic cooldown rule. Raises ValueError unless durationMs is positive. 
proc cooldownSelect(routes: var Routes; pattern: string; rule: CooldownRule) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Assigns or replaces a cooldown for an existing select pattern. 
proc cooldownSlash(routes: var Routes; path: string; rule: CooldownRule) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Assigns or replaces the cooldown for an existing slash path. Buckets are owned by each AppBinding; invalid duration or unknown path raises RouteDefinitionError. 
proc cooldownUserCommand(routes: var Routes; name: string; rule: CooldownRule) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError, KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Assigns or replaces a binding-local cooldown for a user command. 
proc customId(ctx: ComponentContext | ModalContext): string
Returns the complete submitted custom ID before capture extraction. 
proc decodeInteraction(raw: JsonNode): Interaction {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, InvalidInteractionError, InvalidInteractionError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Validates and decodes a Discord gateway interaction into an owned snapshot. Supports slash, user, message, autocomplete, component, and modal-submit payloads. Required/malformed fields, numeric permission failures, and unsupported wire kinds raise InvalidInteractionError. The original JSON is deep-copied for later access through raw. 
proc deferReply(ctx: InteractionContext; ephemeral = false): Future[void] {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
                                InvalidResponseStateError,
                                ResponseRejectedError, ValueError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Acknowledges now and reserves an original message for a later edit. Legal only in Pending; success moves to DeferredReply. The ephemeral choice is fixed by this acknowledgement and cannot be changed later. 
proc deferUpdate(ctx: ComponentContext): Future[void] {....stackTrace: false, raises: [
    Exception, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError, InvalidResponseStateError,
    ResponseRejectedError, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Acknowledges a component without changing its source message yet. Legal only in Pending; success moves to DeferredUpdate, after which editOriginal or followup may be used. 
proc deferUpdate(ctx: ModalContext): Future[void] {....stackTrace: false, raises: [
    Exception, InvalidResponseStateError, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
    ResponseRejectedError, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Defers the source-message update of a component-opened modal. Command-opened or source-less modals cannot use this acknowledgement. 
proc deleteFollowup(ctx: InteractionContext; messageId: MessageId): Future[void] {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
                                InvalidResponseStateError, ValueError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Deletes a follow-up message after acknowledgement. MessageId("@original") is accepted as an alias for deleteOriginal. 
proc deleteOriginal(ctx: InteractionContext): Future[void] {....stackTrace: false, raises: [
    Exception, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError, InvalidResponseStateError,
    ValueError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Deletes the original response after acknowledgement. Raises InvalidResponseStateError while still pending or outcome-unknown. 
proc deny(message: string): CheckDecision {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Creates a rejected route-check decision with a safe user-facing message. Raises ValueError when message is empty. 
proc detach(binding: AppBinding): Future[void] {....stackTrace: false,
    raises: [Exception, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Quiesces, drains active handlers, and restores the gateway's prior hooks. It does not close the underlying gateway session, allowing another owner to continue using the client. Repeated calls after detachment are harmless. 
proc disableAll(components: openArray[V2Component]): seq[V2Component] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Deep-copies a V2 tree and disables every interactive descendant. Non-interactive layout and media values are preserved; input nodes are not mutated and nil nodes remain nil. 
proc disableAll(rows: openArray[ClassicActionRow]): seq[ClassicActionRow] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns copied classic rows with every button and select disabled. The input rows are not mutated. 
proc dispatch(binding: AppBinding; raw: JsonNode): Future[bool] {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ValueError, KeyError,
                                InvalidInteractionError, CatchableError,
                                ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
                                InvalidResponseStateError, ResponseRejectedError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Decodes and routes one raw INTERACTION_CREATE payload. Returns true when a collector or persistent route owns it, false when the binding is quiescing or no route matches. Collectors take precedence over persistent routes. Handlers run checks, then cooldown acquisition, then the typed closure; catchable failures use the app error policy and a missing acknowledgement becomes MissingInitialResponseError. Decode failures and Defect values propagate. 
proc editFollowup(ctx: InteractionContext; messageId: MessageId;
                  body: MessageBody): Future[Message] {....stackTrace: false, raises: [
    Exception, ValueError, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
    InvalidResponseStateError, KeyError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Edits and returns a previously created interaction message. Passing MessageId("@original") delegates to editOriginal; other IDs require an acknowledged context and use Discord webhook edit semantics. 
proc editFollowup(ctx: InteractionContext; messageId: MessageId; content: string): Future[
    Message] {....raises: [Exception, ValueError, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
                        InvalidResponseStateError, KeyError],
               tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Edits an interaction message to plain classic content and returns it. 
proc editOriginal(ctx: InteractionContext; body: MessageBody): Future[Message] {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ValueError,
                                ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
                                InvalidResponseStateError, KeyError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Edits and returns the original interaction response. Legal after defer or response, and turns either deferred state into Responded. Raises InvalidResponseStateError before acknowledgement or when attempting to convert a Components V2 original back to classic. 
proc editOriginal(ctx: InteractionContext; content: string): Future[Message] {....raises: [
    Exception, ValueError, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
    InvalidResponseStateError, KeyError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Edits the original response to plain classic content and returns it. A Components V2 original rejects this convenience overload. 
proc embed(title = ""; description = ""; color = none(int)): Embed {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates an embed with optional title, description, and RGB color. Raises ValueError when color is outside 0x000000..0xFFFFFF. 
proc embedAuthor(name: string; url = ""; iconUrl = ""): EmbedAuthor {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates an embed author header, omitting blank optional URLs. Raises ValueError when name is empty. 
proc embedField(name, value: string; inline = false): EmbedField {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates one embed field. Raises ValueError when either visible string is empty. 
proc embedFooter(text: string; iconUrl = ""): EmbedFooter {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates an embed footer, omitting a blank icon URL. Raises ValueError when text is empty. 
proc embedMedia(url: string): EmbedMedia {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Creates an embed image reference. Raises ValueError when url is empty. 
proc field(ctx: ModalContext; name: string): Option[string] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns one submitted modal field without performing type conversion. 
proc fields(ctx: ModalContext): Table[string, string] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns a copy of submitted modal fields keyed by input custom ID. 
proc fileDisplay(attachmentUrl: string; spoiler = false): V2Component {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a V2 file display for attachment://filename. Raises ValueError for network URLs or an empty attachment filename. 
proc filename(value: Attachment): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the existing attachment's filename. 
proc focusedName(ctx: AutocompleteContext): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the wire name of the option currently being completed. 
proc focusedValue(ctx: AutocompleteContext): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the focused option value as typed so far. 
proc followup(ctx: InteractionContext; body: MessageBody): Future[Message] {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ValueError,
                                ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
                                InvalidResponseStateError, KeyError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Creates and returns a follow-up message after acknowledgement. Legal in deferred or responded states. Follow-ups do not change the initial-response state and may independently be classic or Components V2. 
proc followup(ctx: InteractionContext; content: string; ephemeral = false): Future[
    Message] {....raises: [Exception, ValueError, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
                        InvalidResponseStateError, KeyError],
               tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Creates a plain classic follow-up and returns the created message. 
proc globalScope(): CommandScope {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Selects the global application-command overwrite endpoint. 
proc guildId(ctx: InteractionContext): Option[GuildId] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the invoking guild ID, or none outside a guild. 
proc guildId(value: Interaction): Option[GuildId] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the invoking guild, or none for non-guild interactions. 
proc guildLocale(ctx: InteractionContext): Option[string] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the guild's preferred locale when supplied. 
proc guildLocale(value: Interaction): Option[string] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the guild's preferred locale when present. 
proc guildScope(guildId: GuildId): CommandScope {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Selects the application-command overwrite endpoint for guildId. 
proc hash(value: ApplicationId): Hash {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [],
                                        forbids: [].}
Hashes an application ID for use in Nim containers. 
proc hash(value: AttachmentId): Hash {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Hashes an attachment ID for use in Nim containers. 
proc hash(value: ChannelId): Hash {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Hashes a channel ID for use in Nim containers. 
proc hash(value: GuildId): Hash {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Hashes a guild ID for use in Nim containers. 
proc hash(value: InteractionId): Hash {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [],
                                        forbids: [].}
Hashes an interaction ID for use in Nim containers. 
proc hash(value: MessageId): Hash {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Hashes a message ID for use in Nim containers. 
proc hash(value: RoleId): Hash {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Hashes a role ID for use in Nim containers. 
proc hash(value: UserId): Hash {.borrow, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Hashes a user ID for use in Nim containers. 
proc id(value: ActivityInstance): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns Discord's opaque launched-activity instance ID. 
proc id(value: Attachment): AttachmentId {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the existing attachment's Discord snowflake. 
proc id(value: Interaction): InteractionId {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the interaction snowflake. 
proc id(value: Message): MessageId {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the message's Discord snowflake. 
proc id(value: ResolvedChannel): ChannelId {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the channel's Discord snowflake. 
proc id(value: Role): RoleId {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the role's Discord snowflake. 
proc id(value: User): UserId {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the user's Discord snowflake. 
proc inGuild(ctx: InteractionContext): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Reports whether this interaction belongs to a guild. 
proc install(binding: AppBinding; autoSync = true) {....raises: [DimSlashError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Installs DimSlash dispatch and ready hooks into the gateway client once. Existing hooks are preserved and chained for events DimSlash does not own. With autoSync, the first successful ready event calls syncCommands; prior ready callbacks still run if synchronization fails. Repeated calls are idempotent; non-gateway bindings raise DimSlashError. 
proc interaction(ctx: InteractionContext): Interaction {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the immutable owned snapshot for this request. 
proc invokerId(ctx: InteractionContext): Option[UserId] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the invoking user's ID from a request context when available. 
proc invokerId(interaction: Interaction): Option[UserId] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the invoking user's ID when the interaction contains a user. 
proc kind(source: ModalSource): ModalSourceKind {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns whether a command or component opened the modal. 
proc kind(value: Interaction): InteractionKind {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the decoded high-level interaction category. 
proc launchActivity(ctx: SlashCommandContext | UserCommandContext |
    MessageCommandContext |
    ComponentContext |
    ModalContext): Future[ActivityInstance] {....stackTrace: false.}
Launches a Discord Activity as the one initial callback response. Returns Discord's activity instance on success. An ambiguous transport failure moves the context to OutcomeUnknown because retrying may launch twice; autocomplete interactions do not support this operation. 
proc linkButton(label, url: string; disabled = false): Button {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a URL button that opens a link and emits no interaction. Raises ValueError unless the label is 1..80 and URL is 1..512 characters. 
proc locale(ctx: InteractionContext): Option[string] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the invoking user's locale when supplied. 
proc locale(value: Interaction): Option[string] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the invoking user's Discord locale. 
proc mediaGallery(items: openArray[MediaItem]): V2Component {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a media gallery containing 1..10 items. Raises ValueError outside that range. 
proc mediaItem(url: string; description = ""; spoiler = false): MediaItem {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a V2 media reference with optional description and spoiler state. The containing node validates whether its URL form is legal. 
proc member(ctx: InteractionContext): Option[Member] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns invoking guild-member data, or none outside a guild. 
proc member(value: Interaction): Option[Member] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns guild membership data for a guild invocation. 
proc mentionableSelect(customId: string; placeholder = ""; minValues = 1;
                       maxValues = 1; disabled = false): SelectMenu {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a select that accepts users and roles in one ordered result. 
proc message(source: ModalSource): Option[Message] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the source message for a component-opened modal when present. 
proc message(value: Interaction): Option[Message] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the source message for component interactions when present. 
proc messageBody(value: ClassicMessage): MessageBody {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Validates and wraps a classic message for response or edit operations. Enforces Discord limits for content, embeds, rows, files, row shape, and unique custom IDs; invalid input raises ValueError before any request. 
proc messageBody(value: V2Message): MessageBody {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Validates and wraps a Components V2 message for response or edit operations. Invalid file or component structure raises ValueError before any request. 
proc messageCommand(routes: var Routes; name: string;
                    handler: MessageCommandHandler) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Registers a message context-menu command with its typed target context. Invalid or duplicate names raise RouteDefinitionError. 
proc modalDialog(customId, title: string; inputs: varargs[ModalInput]): Modal {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Validates and creates a modal containing 1..5 uniquely identified inputs. Raises ValueError for Discord ID, title, label, count, or length-bound violations before the modal can consume response authority. 
proc name(value: ResolvedChannel): Option[string] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the channel name when Discord included it. 
proc name(value: Role): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the role name supplied with the interaction. 
proc newDiscordApp(factory: RouteFactory; onError: ErrorHandler = nil): DiscordApp {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Evaluates factory exactly once and freezes its routes into an app. The resulting value contains no token or live runtime state and may be bound independently. Route-definition failures propagate immediately. When onError is nil, user rejections get their safe ephemeral text, autocomplete failures get an empty result, and other catchable failures get a generic ephemeral message; Defect values are never caught. 
proc nickname(value: Member): Option[string] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the guild nickname when Discord included one. 
proc noMentions(): AllowedMentions {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns a policy that suppresses all automatic and reply mentions. 
proc optionalModalField[T](ctx: ModalContext; name: string; label = ""): Option[
    T]
Decodes a non-blank optional modal field as string, int, or float. Missing and whitespace-only input return none; malformed numeric text is a UserRejectionError suitable for the default ephemeral error policy. 
proc optionalOption[T](ctx: SlashCommandContext; name: string): Option[T]
Decodes an optional slash option, returning none only when it was omitted. A present but malformed value raises the same errors as requiredOption. 
proc original(ctx: InteractionContext): Future[Message] {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Fetches the current original interaction response from Discord. Discord rejects the request when no original message exists. 
proc paginate(ctx: InteractionContext; pages: openArray[Embed];
              timeoutMs = 120000; ephemeral = false): Future[void] {....raises: [
    Exception, ValueError, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
    InvalidResponseStateError, ResponseRejectedError, KeyError,
    RouteDefinitionError], tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Runs a previous/next embed paginator scoped to this interaction and user. One page is sent without controls; an empty list raises ValueError. On timeout or shutdown the final page remains visible with controls disabled. 
proc permissions(value: Member): Option[Permissions] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns interaction-resolved member permissions when available. 
proc raw(value: Interaction): JsonNode {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns a deep copy of the complete gateway interaction payload. Mutating the result cannot alter context state. 
proc requestDetach(binding: AppBinding) {....raises: [ValueError, Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Begins non-blocking detachment by quiescing dispatch and waking collectors. Call detach to wait for active handlers and restore prior gateway hooks. 
proc requestStop(binding: AppBinding) {....raises: [ValueError, Exception],
                                        tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Quiesces the binding synchronously without waiting or closing the gateway. New dispatches return false and every pending collector completes with none. Active handlers continue so callers may subsequently detach or stop and await a clean drain. 
proc requiredModalField[T](ctx: ModalContext; name: string; label = ""): T
Decodes a required modal field as string, int, or float. Missing fields raise InvalidInteractionError; invalid numeric text raises UserRejectionError using label as its user-facing name when supplied. 
proc requiredOption[T](ctx: SlashCommandContext; name: string): T
Decodes one required slash option by its Discord wire name. Supported targets are scalar primitives, DimSlash resolved models, enums, integer ranges, and distinct string/int types. Missing, malformed, unresolved, or out-of-range data raises InvalidInteractionError. 
proc respond(ctx: InteractionContext; body: MessageBody): Future[Message] {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ValueError,
                                ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
                                InvalidResponseStateError,
                                ResponseRejectedError, KeyError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Sends the one immediate message response and fetches its created message. Legal only in Pending; success moves to Responded. A definite Discord rejection leaves the state pending, while an ambiguous transport failure moves it to OutcomeUnknown and raises ResponseOutcomeUnknownError. 
proc respond(ctx: InteractionContext; content: string; ephemeral = false): Future[
    Message] {....raises: [Exception, ValueError, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
                        InvalidResponseStateError, ResponseRejectedError,
                        KeyError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Sends a plain classic initial response and returns the created message. This is the convenience form of respond(classicMessage(...).messageBody). 
proc responseState(ctx: InteractionContext): ResponseState {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the current authoritative initial-response state. 
proc roleSelect(customId: string; placeholder = ""; minValues = 1;
                maxValues = 1; disabled = false): SelectMenu {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a Discord role select with validated ID and cardinality. 
proc scopedId(ctx: InteractionContext; tag: string): string {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Builds a per-interaction custom ID as ds:<tag>:<interaction-id>. Raises ValueError when the result exceeds Discord's 100-character limit. 
proc section(texts: openArray[string]; accessory: SectionAccessory): V2Component {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a section with 1..3 markdown text blocks and one accessory. Raises ValueError for an invalid text-block count. 
proc select(routes: var Routes; pattern: string; handler: ComponentHandler) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Registers a persistent select route for a custom-ID pattern. Button and select namespaces are separate. During dispatch, exact matches win, then longer literal prefixes, then registration order. 
proc selectedChannels(ctx: ComponentContext): seq[ResolvedChannel] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, InvalidInteractionError, Exception], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Decodes selected channels in Discord submission order. Missing resolved channel data raises InvalidInteractionError. 
proc selectedMembers(ctx: ComponentContext): seq[Member] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, InvalidInteractionError, Exception], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Decodes selected guild members in submission order. Both resolved member and user objects are required for every value. 
proc selectedMentionables(ctx: ComponentContext): seq[Mentionable] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, Exception, InvalidInteractionError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Decodes selected users and roles into one ordered variant sequence. A value absent from both resolved collections raises InvalidInteractionError. 
proc selectedRoles(ctx: ComponentContext): seq[Role] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, InvalidInteractionError, Exception], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Decodes selected roles in Discord submission order. Missing resolved role data raises InvalidInteractionError. 
proc selectedUsers(ctx: ComponentContext): seq[User] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, InvalidInteractionError, Exception], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Decodes selected users in Discord submission order. Raises InvalidInteractionError if any selected ID lacks resolved data. 
proc selectMenu(customId: string; options: openArray[SelectOption];
                placeholder = ""; minValues = 1; maxValues = 1; disabled = false): SelectMenu {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a string select with 1..25 caller-defined options. Validates custom ID, placeholder, selection cardinality, and default count; invalid combinations raise ValueError. 
proc selectOption(label, value: string; description = ""; default = false): SelectOption {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates one string-select option. Label and value must contain 1..100 characters and description at most 100; otherwise ValueError is raised. 
proc separator(divider = true; spacing: range[1 .. 2] = 1): V2Component {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a V2 separator with small (1) or large (2) spacing. 
proc showModal(ctx: SlashCommandContext | ComponentContext; modal: Modal): Future[
    void] {....stackTrace: false.}
Opens modal as the initial response to a command or component. Legal only in Pending; success consumes response authority and moves to Responded. Use modalDialog to validate raw modal values first. 
proc slashRaw(routes: var Routes; name, description: string;
              options: seq[CommandOption]; handler: SlashHandler) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Registers a root slash command from an explicit option schema and handler. Prefer the typed slash macro for normal use. Invalid Discord names, descriptions, option order/schema, duplicates, or root/subcommand conflicts raise RouteDefinitionError during app construction. 
proc source(ctx: ModalContext): Option[ModalSource] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns how the modal was opened when Discord supplied source metadata. 
proc start(binding: AppBinding; autoSync = true): Future[void] {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, DimSlashError, ValueError, KeyError], tags: [
    RootEffect, TimeEffect, ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect,
    WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Installs the binding and runs its configured gateway session until it ends. Gateway intents, message-content access, and reconnect behavior come from bindGateway. Connection, sync, callback, and handler failures propagate, except for session termination observed after an explicit concurrent stop. 
proc stop(binding: AppBinding): Future[void] {....stackTrace: false,
    raises: [Exception, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect, WriteIOEffect,
    ReadIOEffect, TimeEffect, ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect], forbids: [].}
Quiesces, drains active handlers, and closes the gateway session. Pending collectors complete with none before the drain. Use detach instead when the shared client must remain connected. 
proc syncCommands(binding: AppBinding): Future[seq[SyncResult]] {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ValueError, DimSlashError, KeyError,
                                RouteDefinitionError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Authoritatively bulk-overwrites every explicitly managed command scope. An empty local route table clears each listed scope; unlisted scopes remain untouched. Application ID resolution is cached per binding. Results follow managed-scope order, and transport failures propagate without marking the binding synchronized so a later ready event may retry. 
proc target(ctx: MessageCommandContext): Message {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the resolved target message of a message context-menu command. 
proc target(ctx: UserCommandContext): User {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the resolved target user of a user context-menu command. 
proc targetMember(ctx: UserCommandContext): Option[Member] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the target's guild membership when invoked in a guild. 
proc textDisplay(content: string): V2Component {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Creates a Components V2 markdown text node. Full length validation occurs when the containing message is wrapped. 
proc textInput(customId, label: string; style = ShortText; description = "";
               required = true; minLength = none(int); maxLength = none(int);
               value = none(string); placeholder = none(string)): ModalInput {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Describes one modal text input using Discord's Label representation. Cross-field and wire length constraints are validated by modalDialog. 
proc thumbnailAccessory(url: string; description = ""; spoiler = false): SectionAccessory {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a thumbnail accessory for a Components V2 section. 
proc toUint64(value: Permissions): uint64 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the raw Discord permission bit mask. 
proc update(ctx: ComponentContext; body: MessageBody): Future[Message] {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ValueError,
                                ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
                                InvalidResponseStateError,
                                ResponseRejectedError, KeyError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Immediately replaces the component's source message and returns it. Legal only in Pending; success moves to Responded. Edit semantics explicitly clear omitted classic fields, and a V2 original cannot later be converted back to classic content. 
proc update(ctx: ComponentContext; content: string): Future[Message] {....raises: [
    Exception, ValueError, ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
    InvalidResponseStateError, ResponseRejectedError, KeyError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Replaces a component's source message with plain classic content. 
proc update(ctx: ModalContext; body: MessageBody): Future[Message] {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ValueError,
                                InvalidResponseStateError,
                                ResponseOutcomeUnknownError,
                                ResponseRejectedError, KeyError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Replaces the source message of a component-opened modal and returns it. Raises InvalidResponseStateError for command-opened modals or when the initial response is no longer pending. 
proc update(ctx: ModalContext; content: string): Future[Message] {....raises: [
    Exception, ValueError, InvalidResponseStateError,
    ResponseOutcomeUnknownError, ResponseRejectedError, KeyError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Replaces a component-opened modal's source message with plain content. 
proc uploadedFile(filename, content: string; description = ""): UploadedFile {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates an in-memory multipart upload. filename must be a non-empty basename with no path components; violations raise ValueError. content may contain arbitrary bytes. 
proc url(value: Attachment): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns Discord's URL for downloading the existing attachment. 
proc user(ctx: InteractionContext): User {....raises: [InvalidInteractionError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the invoking user, raising InvalidInteractionError when absent. 
proc user(value: Interaction): Option[User] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the invoking user when present in the payload. 
proc user(value: Member): User {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the user account belonging to this guild member. 
proc userCommand(routes: var Routes; name: string; handler: UserCommandHandler) {.
    ...raises: [RouteDefinitionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Registers a user context-menu command with its typed target context. Names must contain 1..32 visible Unicode characters and be unique. 
proc userMessage(error: ref UserRejectionError): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns only the safe rejection text, excluding async traceback decoration. 
proc username(value: User): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the current username supplied with the interaction. 
proc userRejection(message: string): ref UserRejectionError {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a deliberate user-facing rejection with a stable safe message. Raise the returned exception from a handler or check helper; the default error policy responds ephemerally without exposing an async traceback. 
proc userSelect(customId: string; placeholder = ""; minValues = 1;
                maxValues = 1; disabled = false): SelectMenu {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a Discord user select. Selection cardinality must satisfy 0 <= minValues <= maxValues <= 25. 
proc v2ActionRow(buttons: varargs[Button]): V2Component {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a Components V2 action row containing 1..5 buttons. Raises ValueError outside that range. 
proc v2ActionRow(menu: SelectMenu): V2Component {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Creates a Components V2 action row whose sole child is menu. 
proc values(ctx: ComponentContext): seq[string] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns a copy of raw select values in Discord submission order. 
proc waitForButton(binding: AppBinding; pattern: string; timeoutMs = 60000;
                   userId = none(UserId); messageId = none(MessageId)): Future[
    Option[ComponentContext]] {....raises: [ValueError, RouteDefinitionError,
    Exception], tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Collects one button press matching a single pattern. 
proc waitForButton(binding: AppBinding; patterns: openArray[string];
                   timeoutMs = 60000; userId = none(UserId);
                   messageId = none(MessageId)): Future[Option[ComponentContext]] {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, RouteDefinitionError, Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Collects one button press matching any pattern on binding. No user filter is applied unless userId is supplied. 
proc waitForButton(ctx: InteractionContext; pattern: string; timeoutMs = 60000;
                   userId: Option[UserId] = ctx.invokerId;
                   messageId = none(MessageId)): Future[Option[ComponentContext]] {....raises: [
    InvalidResponseStateError, ValueError, RouteDefinitionError, Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Collects one button pattern, defaulting to the invoking user. 
proc waitForButton(ctx: InteractionContext; patterns: openArray[string];
                   timeoutMs = 60000; userId: Option[UserId] = ctx.invokerId;
                   messageId = none(MessageId)): Future[Option[ComponentContext]] {....raises: [
    InvalidResponseStateError, ValueError, RouteDefinitionError, Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Collects one of several button patterns, defaulting to the invoking user. 
proc waitForComponent(binding: AppBinding; kinds: set[ComponentInteractionKind];
                      patterns: openArray[string]; timeoutMs = 60000;
                      userId = none(UserId); messageId = none(MessageId)): Future[
    Option[ComponentContext]] {....raises: [ValueError, RouteDefinitionError,
    Exception], tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Collects the first matching button or select before persistent routes run. Patterns use the same {name} and {name:int} captures as routes. Optional user/message filters prevent unrelated presses. Returns none on timeout or binding shutdown; invalid input raises ValueError. 
proc waitForComponent(ctx: InteractionContext;
                      kinds: set[ComponentInteractionKind];
                      patterns: openArray[string]; timeoutMs = 60000;
                      userId: Option[UserId] = ctx.invokerId;
                      messageId = none(MessageId)): Future[
    Option[ComponentContext]] {....raises: [InvalidResponseStateError, ValueError,
    RouteDefinitionError, Exception], tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect],
                                forbids: [].}
Collects the next matching component for an acknowledged request. By default only the invoking user may satisfy it. Raises InvalidResponseStateError while the initial response is still pending; returns none on timeout or shutdown. 
proc waitForModal(binding: AppBinding; pattern: string; timeoutMs = 300000;
                  userId = none(UserId)): Future[Option[ModalContext]] {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, RouteDefinitionError, Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Collects one modal submission matching a single pattern. 
proc waitForModal(binding: AppBinding; patterns: openArray[string];
                  timeoutMs = 300000; userId = none(UserId)): Future[
    Option[ModalContext]] {....raises: [ValueError, RouteDefinitionError, Exception],
                            tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
