Collects the first modal submission matching any pattern before routes run. Returns none on timeout or shutdown. No user filter is applied unless userId is supplied; an empty pattern list or non-positive timeout raises ValueError. 
proc waitForModal(ctx: InteractionContext; pattern: string; timeoutMs = 300000;
                  userId: Option[UserId] = ctx.invokerId): Future[
    Option[ModalContext]] {....raises: [InvalidResponseStateError, ValueError,
                                     RouteDefinitionError, Exception],
                            tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Collects one modal pattern, defaulting to the invoking user. 
proc waitForModal(ctx: InteractionContext; patterns: openArray[string];
                  timeoutMs = 300000; userId: Option[UserId] = ctx.invokerId): Future[
    Option[ModalContext]] {....raises: [InvalidResponseStateError, ValueError,
                                     RouteDefinitionError, Exception],
                            tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Collects a modal submitted after this request was acknowledged. The invoking user is the default filter. Pending response state raises InvalidResponseStateError; timeout or shutdown returns none. 
proc waitForSelect(binding: AppBinding; pattern: string; timeoutMs = 60000;
                   userId = none(UserId); messageId = none(MessageId)): Future[
    Option[ComponentContext]] {....raises: [ValueError, RouteDefinitionError,
    Exception], tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Collects one select submission matching a single pattern. 
proc waitForSelect(binding: AppBinding; patterns: openArray[string];
                   timeoutMs = 60000; userId = none(UserId);
                   messageId = none(MessageId)): Future[Option[ComponentContext]] {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, RouteDefinitionError, Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Collects one string or entity select matching any pattern. Decode resolved values from the returned context with selectedUsers, selectedRoles, selectedChannels, or selectedMentionables. 
proc waitForSelect(ctx: InteractionContext; pattern: string; timeoutMs = 60000;
                   userId: Option[UserId] = ctx.invokerId;
                   messageId = none(MessageId)): Future[Option[ComponentContext]] {....raises: [
    InvalidResponseStateError, ValueError, RouteDefinitionError, Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Collects one select pattern, defaulting to the invoking user. 
proc waitForSelect(ctx: InteractionContext; patterns: openArray[string];
                   timeoutMs = 60000; userId: Option[UserId] = ctx.invokerId;
                   messageId = none(MessageId)): Future[Option[ComponentContext]] {....raises: [
    InvalidResponseStateError, ValueError, RouteDefinitionError, Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Collects one of several select patterns, defaulting to the invoking user.

Macros

macro groupSubcommand(routes: var Routes;
                      commandName, commandDescription: static string;
                      groupName, groupDescription: static string;
                      name, description: static string; handler: untyped): untyped
Registers one typed subcommand beneath a command group. Paths are addressed elsewhere as command/group/subcommand; duplicate or inconsistent root/group definitions raise RouteDefinitionError. 
macro modal(routes: var Routes; pattern: static string; handler: untyped): untyped
Registers a modal route and derives typed fields from handler parameters. The handler must start with ModalContext; remaining string, int, and float parameters decode submitted text. Option[T] or defaults accept blank/omitted fields, while numeric conversion failures become safe UserRejectionError values. The name pragma overrides the input custom ID and description/desc supplies its user-facing validation label.
routes.modal("feedback:{ticket:int}",
  proc(ctx: ModalContext;
       reason {.description: "Reason".}: string;
       score: Option[int]) {.async.} =
    discard await ctx.respond(reason & ": " & $score.get(0)))
macro slash(routes: var Routes; name, description: static string;
            handler: untyped): untyped
Registers a root slash command and derives its option schema from handler. The handler must start with SlashCommandContext and return Future[void]; later parameters become Discord options. Option[T] or a default makes an option optional. Supported types include primitives, owned resolved models, enums, integer ranges, and distinct string/int types. Parameter pragmas configure descriptions, bounds, choices, channel types, and localizations. Invalid handler shapes fail at compile time; route conflicts fail while constructing DiscordApp.
routes.slash("greet", "Greets someone",
  proc(ctx: SlashCommandContext;
       name {.description: "Person to greet".}: string;
       count {.min: 1, max: 5.}: int = 1) {.async.} =
    discard await ctx.respond(("Hello, " & name & "! ").repeat(count)))
macro subcommand(routes: var Routes;
                 commandName, commandDescription: static string;
                 name, description: static string; handler: untyped): untyped
Registers one typed subcommand beneath commandName. All routes sharing the root must agree on commandDescription, and a root handler cannot coexist with subcommands. Handler option derivation matches slash.

Templates

template channels(value: untyped) {.pragma.}
Restricts a channel option to a set of ChannelKind values. 
template choices(value: untyped) {.pragma.}
Supplies static Choice values for a scalar slash option. 
template desc(value: static string) {.pragma.}
Short alias for the description parameter pragma. 
template descLoc(value: untyped) {.pragma.}
Supplies locale-to-description translations for a slash option. 
template description(value: static string) {.pragma.}
Sets a typed handler parameter's Discord option description. 
template max(value: untyped) {.pragma.}
Sets the inclusive numeric maximum for a slash option. 
template maxLen(value: static int) {.pragma.}
Short alias for the maxLength parameter pragma. 
template maxLength(value: static int) {.pragma.}
Sets the inclusive maximum length for a string slash option. 
template min(value: untyped) {.pragma.}
Sets the inclusive numeric minimum for a slash option. 
template minLen(value: static int) {.pragma.}
Short alias for the minLength parameter pragma. 
template minLength(value: static int) {.pragma.}
Sets the inclusive minimum length for a string slash option. 
template name(value: static string) {.pragma.}
Overrides the Discord wire name derived from a handler parameter. 
template nameLoc(value: untyped) {.pragma.}
Supplies locale-to-name translations for a slash option.
